question: What action might be most appropriate for a person who wants to join the group of people with umbrellas on the freeway? Select from the following options: (A) Wait for the traffic to clear. (B) Use the overpass to cross the highway. (C) Walk on the highway road. (D) Drive around the traffic jam.
gold_answer: Wait for the traffic to clear
answer_choices: Wait for the traffic to clear
Use the overpass to cross the highway
